info.longName: USCF Sustainable Battery Metals Strategy Fund

funds_data.description: The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing primarily in metals derivative instruments (“Metals Derivatives”) and, to a lesser extent in the equity securities of companies that are economically tied to the metals that are necessary for “Electrification.” As an important component of the fund’s sustainable strategy, the fund also seeks to achieve a “net-zero” carbon footprint by purchasing carbon offset investments (“Carbon Offset Investments”) in an amount equal to the estimated aggregate carbon emissions of the fund’s holdings. It is non-diversified.
